concerns.text: Research.md identifies only 2 high-suitability datasets (UCI HAR, UCI Shopper) but SC-006 requires ≥10 datasets with valid numeric values. The plan states '~10-15 datasets (sampled from verified sources)' without identifying additional verified sources. This creates a feasibility gap: the success criteria cannot be met with currently identified datasets.

FR-001 requires downloading from 'OpenML Small Datasets collection' but research.md explicitly states this has NO verified source in the allowed block. The plan adapts to UCI links but the spec text remains uncorrected, creating a mismatch between spec requirements and available verified data sources.

Plan states '~10-15 datasets (sampled from verified sources)' without citing which verified sources beyond UCI HAR/Shopper. Per Constitution Principle II, all dataset sources must be cited from the # Verified datasets block. Add specific dataset names/URLs or adjust SC-006 to match available verified datasets.
